predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second (deceased) person.

predicates.name: served_as_main_family_residence_at_estate_opening
predicates.description: The immovable property served as the main residence of the family at the time the estate of the deceased person opened.

predicates.name: is_heir_of
predicates.description: The first person is an heir of the second (deceased) person.

predicates.name: acquires_right_to_lease
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires the right to the lease of the immovable property under article 4.20, to the exclusion of all other heirs.

predicates.name: excluded_from_right_to_lease
predicates.description: The person (heir) is excluded from the right to the lease of the immovable property because the surviving spouse acquires that right.
